description: Perform the annual survey rollover for the Employee Pulse survey. Create a new survey titled 'Employee Pulse 2025' by copying the 'Employee Pulse 2024' survey. In the new survey, remove the '2024 Initiatives' question group and add a new question group titled '2025 Strategic Focus'. This new group must include two questions: 'AI_USAGE' (Type: List (Radio), Options: Daily/Weekly/Monthly/Never, Text: 'How frequently do you use Generative AI tools in your daily work?') and 'INNOVATION_IDEA' (Type: Long free text, Text: 'Please share one idea for improving team efficiency this year.'). Activate the 'Employee Pulse 2025' survey. Login credentials: admin / Admin123!
